### Post by joel@parke.ods.org on 2008-11-04
Hi,

After upgrading, sometimes I have some internet connectivity - but I always have local network functioning.  I have two network connections, eth1 and eth2 - both wired.

joel@parke:/etc$ cat resolv.conf ... SHOWS:
# Dynamic resolv.conf(5) file for glibc resolver(3) generated by resolvconf(8)
#     DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE BY HAND -- YOUR CHANGES WILL BE OVERWRITTEN
nameserver 208.67.222.222
nameserver 208.67.220.220

Which is correct.  But I cannot ping anything.  What other files should I check?  Your help is GREATLY appreciated!  

Thanks,
Joel Parke

### Post by joel@parke.ods.org on 2008-11-04
Since I can't ping my DNS servers, something very basic must be wrong after the upgrade.  Perhaps the gateway is not set properly?
